# GitHub repository settings (manual)

`gh` write access may be unavailable in some environments. Set these in
**GitHub → Settings → General** (and Topics on the repo homepage).

## About → Description (recommended)

```text
FreeSWITCH module for Twilio Media Streams–compatible bidirectional audio over WebSocket (AI voice agents, ASR, barge-in)
```

中文备选：

```text
FreeSWITCH WebSocket 双向实时音频旁路模块，协议兼容 Twilio Media Streams（AI 语音、ASR、打断）
```

## About → Website

Leave empty until docs site exists, or point to this repo `docs/` later.

## Topics (add all)

```text
freeswitch
websocket
media-streams
twilio-compatible
voice-ai
realtime-audio
asr
tts
barge-in
voip
sip
c
mit-license
```

## Visibility

Public (required for community contribution).
